zh.Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德
zh.Sutton Coldfield, Birmingham district, W: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Harman於1380年出生在英國瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德時，他的父親Walter Harman21歲，母親Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon21歲。他於1430年與Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Harman于1380年出生在英国瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德时，他的父亲Walter Harman21岁，母亲Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon21岁。他于1430年与Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Harman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southeast), Dutch, and Czech: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’ (see Hermann ). In England this name was introduced by the Normans.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): perhaps a nickname for someone with a copious or noticeable head of hair (see   Haar  ).

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Herman
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, Flemish, Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. Compare Harman 5.
Americanized form of German   Hermann  , a cognate of 1 above.
English: perhaps a shortened form of Herniman, a topographic name for a ‘dweller (in a) nook or corner of land’, from Middle English herne, hirne, hurne + man. See also Hearn .

variants.name: Hermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Jurgen, Mathias, Gottlieb, Horst, Juergen, Klaus, Lorenz, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Harman 5.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German name (see 1 above). Compare   Herman  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Harman was born in 1380, in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England, his father, Walter Harman, was 21 and his mother, Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon, was 21. He married Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire in 1430, in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in his hometown, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Harman est né en 1380, à Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Harman, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire en 1430, à Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Harmanが1380年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールドで生まれた時，父Walter Harmanは21歳，母Mrs Walter Harman or Harmonは21歳であった。1430年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールドでAnna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Harman(이)가 1380년 영국 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Harman(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드에서 Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Harman родился в 1380 г. в местности суттон колдфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Harman было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Walter Harman or Harmon, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire в 1430 г. в местности суттон колдфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Англия.
